message:
feat(extract): add Form body extractor for URL-encoded data

Implements Form<T> extractor for application/x-www-form-urlencoded POST
bodies, mirroring the FastAPI Python form handling pattern.

FormConfig:
- DEFAULT_FORM_LIMIT: 1MB maximum body size
- limit(): configurable size limit
- Stored in app state for per-route customization

Form<T> extractor:
- Deserializes form data into T using serde_urlencoded
- new(), into_inner() accessors
- Deref/DerefMut for ergonomic field access

FormExtractError variants:
- UnsupportedMediaType: wrong/missing Content-Type
- PayloadTooLarge: body exceeds limit
- DeserializeError: serde_urlencoded failure
- StreamingNotSupported: streaming bodies rejected
- InvalidUtf8: non-UTF-8 body bytes

Request/Response updates:
- Request: helpers for form extraction
- Response: form-related status codes

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
